project(dxc-bin)

# Detect HOST architecture for the Tool
if (CMAKE_HOST_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR)
    set(DXC_HOST_ARCH ${CMAKE_HOST_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR})
else()
    set(DXC_HOST_ARCH "x86_64")
endif()

if (DXC_HOST_ARCH MATCHES "arm64|aarch64")
    set(DXC_HOST_ARCH_DIR "arm64")
else()
    set(DXC_HOST_ARCH_DIR "x64")
endif()

# Detect TARGET architecture for the Library
if (CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES)
    set(DXC_TARGET_ARCH ${CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES})
elseif(CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR)
    set(DXC_TARGET_ARCH ${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR})
else()
    set(DXC_TARGET_ARCH ${CMAKE_HOST_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR})
endif()

if (DXC_TARGET_ARCH MATCHES "arm64|aarch64")
    set(DXC_TARGET_ARCH_DIR "arm64")
else()
    set(DXC_TARGET_ARCH_DIR "x64")
endif()

set(DIRECTX_DXC_INCLUDE "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/inc")

# Configure Tool (Host)
if (WIN32)
    set(DIRECTX_DXC_TOOL "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/bin/${DXC_HOST_ARCH_DIR}/dxc.exe" CACHE INTERNAL "")
elseif (APPLE)
    set(DIRECTX_DXC_TOOL ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E env "DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH=${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/${DXC_HOST_ARCH_DIR}" "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/bin/${DXC_HOST_ARCH_DIR}/dxc-macos" CACHE INTERNAL "")
else()
    set(DIRECTX_DXC_TOOL ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E env "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/${DXC_HOST_ARCH_DIR}" "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/bin/${DXC_HOST_ARCH_DIR}/dxc-linux" CACHE INTERNAL "")
endif()

# Configure Library (Target)
if (WIN32)
    set(DIRECTX_DXCOMPILER_LIB "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/${DXC_TARGET_ARCH_DIR}/dxcompiler.lib")
    set(DIRECTX_DXCOMPILER_DLL "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/bin/${DXC_TARGET_ARCH_DIR}/dxcompiler.dll")
    set(DIRECTX_DXIL_DLL "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/bin/${DXC_TARGET_ARCH_DIR}/dxil.dll")
elseif (APPLE)
    set(DIRECTX_DXCOMPILER_LIB "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/${DXC_TARGET_ARCH_DIR}/libdxcompiler.dylib")
else()
    set(DIRECTX_DXCOMPILER_LIB "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/${DXC_TARGET_ARCH_DIR}/libdxcompiler.so")
endif()

add_library(Microsoft::DirectXShaderCompiler SHARED IMPORTED GLOBAL)
target_include_directories(Microsoft::DirectXShaderCompiler INTERFACE "${DIRECTX_DXC_INCLUDE}")
if (WIN32)
    set_property(TARGET Microsoft::DirectXShaderCompiler PROPERTY IMPORTED_LOCATION "${DIRECTX_DXCOMPILER_DLL}")
    set_property(TARGET Microsoft::DirectXShaderCompiler PROPERTY IMPORTED_IMPLIB "${DIRECTX_DXCOMPILER_LIB}")

    add_library(Microsoft::DXIL SHARED IMPORTED GLOBAL)
    target_include_directories(Microsoft::DXIL INTERFACE "${DIRECTX_DXC_INCLUDE}")
    set_property(TARGET Microsoft::DXIL PROPERTY IMPORTED_LOCATION "${DIRECTX_DXIL_DLL}")
    set_property(TARGET Microsoft::DXIL PROPERTY IMPORTED_IMPLIB "${DIRECTX_DXCOMPILER_LIB}")
else()
    set_property(TARGET Microsoft::DirectXShaderCompiler PROPERTY IMPORTED_LOCATION "${DIRECTX_DXCOMPILER_LIB}")
endif()
